title: taraxacum rufofructum
intro: Taraxacum rufofructum, also known as the red-fruited dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. Taraxacum rufofructum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
